title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, and database basics.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master the fundamentals of user interface and user experience design with wireframes, prototypes, and modern design principles.

title: Python for Data Analysis
description: Learn how to analyze, clean, and visualize data using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and real-world datasets.

title: Digital Marketing Essentials
description: Build a strong foundation in digital marketing, including SEO, social media marketing, content strategy, and campaign analytics.

title: React & Next.js Crash Course
description: Create fast and scalable web applications using React, Next.js App Router, reusable components, routing, and API integration.

title: Machine Learning Foundations
description: Understand the core concepts of machine learning, including supervised learning, model training, evaluation, and practical ML workflows.
